title: Scheduled API downtime on September 10th, 2024

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
On Tuesday, September 10th, at 7:30 AM EST, we will conduct 60 minutes of planned maintenance on the following low-utilization endpoints in the RC version (i.e., 2024-10) ONLY:

  • Emails & Activities timeline items
  • Updates
  • Marketplace app discounts

Other queries and mutations may also experience very brief periods of downtime. If your call fails, wait 60 seconds and try again.
